params.name: Antigone
params.description:
On Dec 30, 442 BC, Sophocles created this famous tragedy.
Antigone is a famous tragedy from ancient Greece, written by Sophocles, one of the three great tragedians of Athens. The play describes Antigone, the daughter of Oedipus, who defies the king's orders and buries her rebellious brother, for which she is sentenced to death. The play also portrays the tragic fate of the king, who ends up losing his wife and children. The play explores the conflict between natural law and state law, with hi …
